title: Oscillating Overthruster
description: The latest from MERA — experimental electronic and nu jazz fused into something entirely new. Lossless WAV download, DRM-free.

title: Spiraling
description: Spiraling through space and sound. Lossless WAV download, DRM-free.

title: The Star
author: H.G. Wells
description: A new celestial body appears over the earth in the early 20th century, the reactions, stories and misinformation make for an intersting and short read with some running pop-up commentary by Bob the somewhat Humanist.

title: The Star (Audiobook)
author: H.G. Wells
description: The first Bob the somewhat Humanist audiobook! H.G. Wells' "The Star" read aloud with the same pop-up commentary from the Null Press ebook edition. A new celestial body appears over the earth — experience the reactions, stories, and misinformation with Bob's running commentary in audio form.

title: Metamorphosis
author: Franz Kafka
description: Gregor Samsa wakes to find himself transformed into a monstrous insect — Kafka's iconic novella of alienation and absurdity, with pop-up commentary by Bob the somewhat Humanist. Null Press Edition with interactive features and hyperlinked notes.

title: Off On a Comet
author: Jules Verne
description: A comet grazes the Earth and carries a handful of survivors on an extraordinary voyage through the solar system — Jules Verne's wildly inventive adventure, with pop-up commentary by Bob the somewhat Humanist. Null Press Edition with interactive features and hyperlinked notes.

title: The Underground City
author: Jules Verne
description: Ten years after a Scottish coal mine closes, a mysterious letter leads engineer James Starr back to discover an impossible new world beneath the earth — Jules Verne's subterranean adventure of mystery, light, and darkness, with pop-up commentary by Bob the somewhat Humanist. Null Press Edition with interactive features and hyperlinked notes.

title: Space Jazz Album
description: A cosmic journey of jazz and synths from My Evil Robot Army. Listen on compressed streaming services or download the lossless version here!

title: Travel Beyond Album
description: MERA's latest: lush soundscapes for the adventurous spirit. Listen on compressed streaming services or download the lossless version here!

title: Explorations Album
description: Ambient and experimental journeys by MERA. Listen on compressed streaming services or download the lossless version here!

title: Explorations in Blue Album
description: MERA explores the color blue in sound. Listen on compressed streaming services or download the lossless version here!
